name: Beef Pastry Pockets
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb Ground beef, browned and cooled
1 sheet Frozen puff pastry, thawed and cut into 5-inch squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the filling ingredients.
2. In the center of each square, place a heaping 1/3 cupful of filling.
3. Moisten the edges of the pastry with water.
4. Fold over to form triangles.
5. Press with a fork to seal.
6. Bake at 400°F for about 20 minutes or until golden brown.
